subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #073 Healing by Material Means
subcodes.first_line: Yesterday at table we mentioned, in connection with the question of spiritual medicine and healing, how illnesses can be cured through spiritual powers.
subcodes.first_line_orig: دیروز در سر ناهار در مسئلهء طب و علاج روحانی ذکر شد که بقوای معنویه معالجهء امراض میشود
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology, @the animal kingdom
